source.title: TripleTen: 200+ Hours Saved Monthly with AI Admissions

pain_points: Unable to scale admissions during summer 2024 growth surge
High prospective student inquiry volume exceeded team capacity
Hiring delays - had to wait for new hires to onboard
Admissions advisors spent excessive time on initial inquiries
Delayed follow-ups caused prospects to seek alternatives

volume_metrics.raw_description: 17,000 calls handled monthly, high volume during growth surge

goals: Handle inquiry volume without waiting for new hires
Free advisors for deeper engagement with qualified prospects
Reduce response time to prevent prospect loss

roi_achieved.raw_description: 3,000+ hours saved since August 2024, 200 hours saved monthly, 20% increase in pickup and conversion rates

key_features: Branded Call ID for improved pickup rates

meta.quality_notes: Excellent detail including timeline, hours saved, call volumes, and conversion metrics. Clear implementation approach.
